subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God alone, and blessings and peace upon Him through Whom all things began and by Whom they were sealed, Who was the Manifestation of this Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله وحده و الصلوه و السلام علی الذی به بدء و منه ختم الذی کان مظهر هذه
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
